raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove contaminated sleeve and clothing immediately.
STEP 2: Wash hand and affected skin with soap and plenty of water for 15-20 minutes.
STEP 3: Flush eyes with water if any splash occurred.

DO NOT: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents.

ESCALATE: Call poison control or seek medical attention if irritation persists or skin burns.

immediate_steps: Remove contaminated sleeve and clothing immediately.
Wash hand and affected skin with soap and plenty of water for 15-20 minutes.
Flush eyes with water if any splash occurred.
do_not_do: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents.
escalate_when: Call poison control or seek medical attention if irritation persists or skin burns.
